backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that handles job application submissions with storage for applicant data (name, email, phone, message, resume blob) and provides query functions to retrieve applications by ID or get all applications.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features for AKS Engineering website content structure, including enhanced About/Services sections, Projects portfolio, Government section, Quality certifications, and Careers functionality with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend component files describing their functionality, including navigation, hero section, enhanced About/Services/Government/Quality sections with credentials, Projects portfolio, career application form with file upload, and contact information.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, and other UI tokens with custom radius settings.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets up the root div and loads the React application via main.tsx module script with proper viewport and charset configuration.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the complete single-page application layout with Header, Hero, About, Services, Projects, Government, Quality, Careers, Contact, and Footer sections in sequence.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: About section component displaying company credentials in a grid (10+ years, 150+ projects, 75+ team, 98% satisfaction) with detailed certifications and industry affiliations including ISO standards and professional memberships.
frontend/src/components/CareerForm.tsx: React Hook Form-based career application form with validation for name, email, phone, message, and resume file upload that converts files to Uint8Array and submits to backend via React Query mutation with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/Careers.tsx: Careers section wrapper component that displays a heading, introductory text about joining the team, and renders the CareerForm component.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section displaying company contact information (address, phone, email) and registration details (GSTIN, PAN, CIN) in card layouts with icons using Lucide React components.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying company name, copyright, and a branded link to caffeine.ai with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Government.tsx: Government section showcasing project types (PWD, water, urban development, institutional) and a list of completed government projects with client details and outcomes.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile menu, smooth scroll navigation, and responsive mobile menu toggle.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section with background image, headline about infrastructure engineering, and two CTA buttons for downloading corporate profile and tender enquiry.
frontend/src/components/Projects.tsx: Featured projects section displaying three completed infrastructure projects with images, categories, locations, contract values, and completion dates in a card grid layout.
frontend/src/components/Quality.tsx: Quality and compliance section highlighting execution framework, governance practices, ISO certifications, and a list of quality assurance practices.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Services section displaying four core service offerings (civil, water/sewerage, MEP, EPC) with icons, descriptions, and detailed capability lists in a card grid.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and manages an actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, with query caching and automatic invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting job applications with name, email, phone, message, and resume blob to the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart color definitions.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point wrapping the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme with OKLCH values, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a corporate website for Sone Industries infrastructure company with single-page design, navigation sections, service cards, and image requirements for project photos and certifications.
